Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: User profile in the healthcare application for quick login without password

preferences.description: User preferences like sound or notification states

Medication.title: Medication
Medication.description: A scheduled medication for a specific user profile

profileId.description: Reference to the owner profile ID

frequency.description: How often to take the medication

days.description: Days of week to take if custom frequency

times.description: Specific times of day (rano, poludnie, wieczor) with dose detail

Dose.title: Dose
Dose.description: A log of whether a specific medicine dose was taken on a day

medicationName.description: Name of the medication at logging time

date.description: Date of dose in YYYY-MM-DD form

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Medical clinical visits scheduled by the user

profileId.description: Reference to the user profile ID

clinic.description: Medical center or diagnostic lab name

profiles/{profileId}.description: Collection of passwordless user account profiles

profiles/{profileId}/medications/{medica.description: Medication schedules owned by the parent profile

profiles/{profileId}/doses/{doseId}.description: Medication ingestion track history logs owned by parent profile

profiles/{profileId}/visits/{visitId}.description: Medical visits scheduled by parent profile
